subcommands.name: diff
subcommands.description: Open the diff viewer to see the differences between two specified files

subcommands.name: merge
subcommands.description: Open the Merge dialog to merge the specified files

subcommands.name: format
subcommands.description: Apply code style formatting to the specified files

options.description: Specify a comma-separated list of file masks that define the files to be processed
Specify the code style settings file to use for formatting
Use the default code style settings when the code style is not defined for a file or a group of files
Preserve encoding and enforce the charset for reading and writing source files
Run the formatter in the validation mode

subcommands.name: inspect
subcommands.description: Perform code inspection on the specified project

options.description: Run inspections only on local uncommitted changes
Specify the full path to the subdirectory if you don't want to inspect the whole project
Specify the format of the output file with inspection results
Set the verbosity level of the output

subcommands.name: installPlugins
subcommands.description: Install plugins by plugin ID from JetBrains Marketplace or a custom plugin repository

options.description: Do not show the splash screen when loading CLion
Do not reopen projects and show the welcome screen
Do not load manually installed plugins
Wait for the files to be closed before returning to the command prompt
